name: address-rural-no-fsa-pattern
anchor: F1.AD rural address + F1.PC FSA edge
rationale: Subject property is a rural NB address: 'RR #3, Site 22, Comp 7, Fredericton Junction, NB E5L 1A0'. Non-standard street format (Rural Route + Site + Comp). F1.AD ADDR_LINE_RE regex (in canonical-fields.js) expects 'street number + street name + type'; rural addresses don't match. F1.PC FSA parsing (NB E-prefix) still applies. Tests address regex robustness on rural Canadian addresses.
notes: Single-event sequence. GE=NB to also exercise R10-D FSA-letter-to-province mapping for E-prefix postal codes.
